     The Numbers Business Report

Chef (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,424,004Details
International Box Office $15,405,305
Worldwide Box Office $46,829,309
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,380,591
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,867,712
Total $9,248,303
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Chef Carl Casper suddenly quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for its controlling owner, he is left to figure out what’s next. Finding himself in Miami, he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck. Taking to the road, Chef Carl goes back to his roots to reignite his passion for the kitchen—and zest for life and love.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$204,961 (0.7% of total gross)
Legs:11.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:6 opening theaters/1,298 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $46,001,353

Synopsis

Chef Carl Casper suddenly quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for its controlling owner, he is left to figure out what’s next. Finding himself in Miami, he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck. Taking to the road, Chef Carl goes back to his roots to reignite his passion for the kitchen—and zest for life and love.
